name: Gerudo Town
description:
Made this because every other Gerudo Town bot I saw either wasn't that great or had stuff I didn't like in it. Let's see how it goes.

You don't need to be Link if you don't want to be, the bot should be flexible enough to work with anyone. If you're a guy, there's Gerudo Vai armor at Kara Kara Bazaar.

Also, some Gerudo have dicks. You have been warned.

Since this bot got over 500 conversations and 4000 messages, I figure it's time I give you guys what you want. Proxy is now enabled. You can also get the card for your own use here, though note that the version on Janitor was edited slightly to dissuade any age-related shenanigans:

Don't say I never did anything for you. Also there's a new bot to check out.
creator: JDude151
